title: rosa viscaria var. mentita
intro: Rosa viscaria var. mentita, also known as sweet rose or alpine rose, is a flowering plant that belongs to the rose family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa viscaria var. mentita include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate menstrual cramps. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
